sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86320" key="prh=ma/1" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρῆμά</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τι γίνεται</foreign> a sort of <sense id="n86320.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">swelling</tr_> (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παράπρημα</foreign>) arises.</sense> </entryFree>
